summary: Re-converged Open WebUI from the integrated 0.142.0 mainline with the private Ollama connector enabled, verified operator sign-in, and confirmed in-container reachability to `host.docker.internal:11434`.

verification.observed: `make converge-open-webui` completed successfully on 2026-03-25, including the docker-runtime stack, the Open WebUI runtime, and the Proxmox-host Tailscale proxy tasks.
POST to `http://100.118.189.95:8008/api/v1/auths/signin` returned the repo-managed `ops@lv3.org` admin identity after the connector-enabled re-converge.
An Ansible probe on docker-runtime-lv3 returned `{"version":"0.18.2"}` from `sudo docker exec open-webui curl -fsS http://host.docker.internal:11434/api/version`.

notes: The connector remains private-only: Open WebUI reaches Ollama through `host.docker.internal:11434`, and Ollama is not published on the nginx edge.
